title: Ubiquiti UniFi AP U7-Pro-Wall
description: Ubiquiti U7 Pro Wall is a highly powerful triple-band unit supporting Wi-Fi 7 . It operates in the 2.4 GHz band at a speed of 688 Mb/s, in the 5 GHz band at a speed of 4.3 Gb/s, and in the 6 GHz band, even 5.7 Gb/s. Thanks to the triple band, the unit ensures excellent connectivity and extensive coverage. For network connection, a LAN port with a speed of up to 2.5 Gb/s is available. The access point is powered via PoE+ To manage the device, it is necessary to download the original software called UniFi Network Controller from the official website, which allows managing the entire network. An undeniable advantage of the UniFi Controller is that it is completely free without any limitations ! This centralized management allows uploading maps and setting both basic parameters and advanced functions, such as SSID, guest account, splash page, traffic statistics, and a list and status of associated clients, easily… Device Wall mounts Drilling template Cable tie Mounting kit
